name: Buttondown
description: Buttondown — Simple email newsletter tool with Markdown writing, subscriber management, and a REST API.

seo.title: Buttondown — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Buttondown: Buttondown — Simple email newsletter tool with Markdown writing, subscriber management, and a REST API.

when_to_use: Developer newsletter with Markdown writing and subscriber API
Embedding subscription form into a documentation site
Automating subscriber tagging via REST API on sign-up events
Running a paid newsletter with Stripe billing integration
Syncing newsletter subscribers with a CRM via webhooks

pros: Clean Markdown writing experience for newsletters
Honest founder-run product with fair pricing
REST API covers subscribers and sending properly
Paid newsletters supported via Stripe integration
cons: No visual drag-drop editor for designers
Analytics are minimal vs Beehiiv or ConvertKit
Small team means slower feature velocity
review.verdict: The writers newsletter tool: text-first, API-friendly, no bloat. Not for marketers who need funnels.
review.best_for: Indie writers and devs shipping text-heavy newsletters
review.not_for: Marketing teams needing complex automations and design tools
